notes: Stood up Rapier physics for the R3F game module. PhysicsWorld wraps <Physics> with gravity [0,-9.81,0] and a forwarded debug prop. usePhysicsDebug listens on window keydown and toggles on 'P' (case-insensitive, ignored when typing in input/textarea/contentEditable). Game3D.jsx now wraps BaseLighting + ProofOfLife in <PhysicsWorld>; cameras and Sky stay outside the physics tree. The 1/2/3 camera switcher is unchanged and the HUD label was extended to mention 'P physics debug'. ProofOfLife's GroundPlane became a fixed RigidBody with colliders={false} plus an explicit CuboidCollider args=[15,0.05,15] at y=-0.05 — that puts the slab's top face flush at y=0 so the visible plane and the collision surface coincide and dynamic bodies don't z-fight or float. Added one PhysicsSmokeTestCube: a 0.5m dynamic RigidBody with colliders='cuboid' spawned at [0,3,0] so it falls and lands during the smoke test; it is explicitly labeled in a comment so downstream agents (bike-physics) know to remove it. No test files were added because src/renderer/game3d/__tests__/ does not yet exist this cycle. Verified @react-three/rapier ^1.5.0 is in package.json deps and that Physics, RigidBody, CuboidCollider are exported from the installed build. No new top-level dependencies added; no files outside src/renderer/game3d/ were touched.
